mxlibrary: [{"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 40, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "+ (cable)"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 40, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "+ (cable1)"}, {"xml": "", "w": 100, "h": 40, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "cable2"}, {"xml": "", "w": 130, "h": 40, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "cable3"}, {"xml": "", "w": 100, "h": 20, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Cable 5G"}, {"xml": "", "w": 60, "h": 20, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "cable 3G (cable6)"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 30, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Cable 3 wires"}, {"xml": "", "w": 60, "h": 20, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Screen"}, {"xml": "", "w": 30, "h": 30, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Wire of cable"}, {"xml": "", "w": 20, "h": 30, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Wiring"}, {"xml": "", "w": 100, "h": 30, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "cable 3G (kabel3g)"}, {"xml": "", "w": 110, "h": 30, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Cable trifasic + terra"}, {"xml": "", "w": 180, "h": 30, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Cable de 6 fases + terra"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 20, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Wiring section"}, {"xml": "", "w": 30, "h": 10, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Seccio 1 conductor"}, {"xml": "", "w": 70, "h": 10, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Seccio 2 conductors (section2-1conducteurs)"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 10, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Seccio 2 conductors (section2conducteurs)"}, {"xml": "", "w": 70, "h": 10, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Seccio 3 conductors"}]
